parameters.query: SELECT trivia_id, trivia_number, status FROM ct_trivias WHERE trivia_number = {{ $json.trivia_number }} LIMIT 1

SELECT
  u.user_id, u.name, u.document_id, u.phone,
  r.response_id, r.total_goals AS goals_trivia,
  r.multiplier_bonus,
  CASE WHEN r.multiplier_bonus > 0 THEN true ELSE false END AS already_applied
FROM ct_users u
JOIN ct_trivia_responses r ON u.user_id = r.user_id
WHERE r.trivia_id = '{{ $json.trivia_id }}'
  AND r.is_correct = true
  AND r.is_duplicate = false
  AND (
    u.document_id IN ({{ $json.docs_list || "'__NONE__'" }})
    OR u.phone IN ({{ $json.phones_list || "'__NONE__'" }})
  )
ORDER BY u.name
